coach_notes: To build a strong administrative career, focus on developing customer service and accounting skills, as they are foundational for roles like office manager or executive assistant. Start by taking free online courses in customer service and basic accounting (e.g., Coursera or LinkedIn Learning), and practice data entry with spreadsheets. You already have a solid base with clerical support and technical skills—adding these will make you a more versatile and competitive candidate.

jobs.title: Audit-Talent gesucht: Prüfungsassistent (m/w/d) mit Aufstiegsperspektive
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your clerical support and attention to detail are relevant for audit tasks. Basic Excel skills are a foundation for data analysis in auditing.
jobs.gaps: No formal accounting or audit training, lack of German language skills (job is in German), no experience with audit software or financial statements.

jobs.title: Cash Collection Team Support
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your clerical support, communication, and attention to detail are useful for cash collection support. Excel skills help with tracking payments.
jobs.gaps: No direct collections or accounts receivable experience, lack of knowledge in cash collection processes or CRM systems.

jobs.title: Bookkeeper and Administrative Coordinator (Remote, Part-Time)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your clerical support, attention to detail, and organizational skills are relevant for bookkeeping. Remote work aligns with your work study background.
jobs.gaps: No formal bookkeeping training or experience with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks), limited knowledge of financial record-keeping.

jobs.title: Bookkeeping Clerk
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your clerical support, attention to detail, and inventory experience are relevant for bookkeeping clerk duties. Basic Excel skills help with data entry.
jobs.gaps: No direct bookkeeping experience, lack of knowledge in accounting principles or software, need to learn financial data management.

jobs.title: Underwriter – Credit Insurance | Energy Transition Finance
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your investment knowledge and attention to detail are relevant for underwriting. Communication skills help with client interactions.
jobs.gaps: No underwriting or credit insurance experience, lack of knowledge in energy transition finance, no risk assessment or financial analysis background.
